## Checklist

### Legal & Licensing
- [ ] I have read [LICENSE](../LICENSE) and [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I understand that ALL my contributions become the exclusive property of the PixieTrack creator upon merge
- [ ] I understand I will waive all ownership and moral rights to my contributions
- [ ] I confirm I have the legal right to assign these rights (no employer or third-party claims)
- [ ] For corporate contributions: My employer has approved this contribution

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have commented my code (especially complex logic)
- [ ] I have added appropriate TypeScript types
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new warnings or linting errors
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, TECHNICAL_CONTEXT, etc.) if needed
- [ ] I have added/updated comments for new code
- [ ] I have not introduced breaking changes without documentation

### Testing
- [ ] I have tested this on mobile (Android/iOS)
- [ ] I have tested offline functionality
- [ ] I have tested data persistence
- [ ] All tests pass locally
